expected.notes: §10 ADVERSARIAL CASE. A speech about school cafeteria food waste, graded against the SALES PRESENTATION rubric. There is no greeting, no product, no customer, no objections, no close — so the grade must be very low and, critically, must invent NOTHING (zero hallucinated quotes). This one is machine-checkable without human labels: if it scores high, or fabricates a 'close', the grader is broken.
